snippet.title: Dosije - Misterija sivog Citroena | PRVA
snippet.description:
Na samo 200 metara od svoje kuńáe u selu Mramor nadomak NiŇ°a brutalno je likvidiran vlasnik mesare Dakom, ugledni biznismen i porodińćan ńćovek. U tom trenutku meŇ°tani su ostali u Ň°oku, nikom nije bilo jasno kome je smetao ńćovek koji je imao sopstveni biznis i poŇ°teno Ňĺiveo od njega. Da tragedija bude veńáa njegovo telo pronaŇ°ao je mlańĎi sin, dozivao je oca ali bezuspeŇ°no.


Policija se istog trenutka dala u potragu za pońćiniocem. Njihova istraga bila je mukotrpna i temeljna, bilo je momenata kada su nailazili na ńáorsokak i bezizlazne situacije ali ipak ubice su bile i bliŇĺe nego Ň°to su mogli da zamisle.



Pratite nas na: http://bit.ly/PRVAsub

Posetite naŇ° sajt: http://www.prva.rs/
Lajkujte nas i na Fejsbuku: http://bit.ly/PRVAfb
MoŇĺete nas pratiti i na Instagramu: http://bit.ly/PRVAig
MoŇĺete nas pratiti i na Tviteru: http://bit.ly/PRVAtwitter

snippet.title: INTERVJU: Goran Ň†arińá - Tajne Hristovog groba i zabranjena Biblijska uńćenja otkrivena! (2.5.2021)
snippet.description:
Gost emisije "Intervju" bio je Goran Ň†arińá, katolińćki istorińćar i teolog. Postao je poznat nakon Ň°to je u medijima izneo niz tvrdnji po kojima su Srbi potomci Ilira starosedelaca Balkana, a da se moŇĺe pratiti veza stanovnika Lepenskog vira i Vinńće sa danaŇ°njim stanovnicima Srbije i Balkana. On je, kao Ň°to tvrde i brojni istorińćari u Srbiji, objasnio da su Austrija i Nemańćka manipulisali istorijom kako bi Slovene pokazali kao doseljenike na Balkan i u tome naŇ°li opravdanje za kolonizaciju ovog prostora od strane Germana. Goran Ň†arińá odgovara na kljuńćna pitanja na temelju dugogodiŇ°njih istraŇĺivanja arhiva od Vatikana, preko Beńća i Dubrovnika. NaŇ°u proŇ°lost, sadaŇ°njost i buduńánost rekonstruiŇ°e pomońáu nekoliko stotina razlińćitih izvora i koristeńái preko 20 nauńćnih disciplina u analizi. Preporuńćujemo Vam da pogledate ceo intervju i saznate viŇ°e o brojnim zanimljivim temama.

Intervju je snimljen 29.04.2021. godine u naŇ°im prostorijama, u Beogradu. Emisiju je vodio novinar Nemanja Blagojevińá.

*************************************************************

snippet.title: Paris Saint-Germain vs. Manchester City: Extended Highlights | UCL on CBS Sports
snippet.description:
Manchester City picked up a decisive 2-1 win in the first leg of the UEFA semi final against Paris Saint-Germain. 

PSG came out firing in the first half and converted one of their many chances into a goal. Marquinhos scored in the 15‚Äô to give PSG the lead. PSG kept the pressure on in the first half and finished with 9 shots on goal. 

In the second half PSG was content to sit back and defend the one goal lead. Manchester City took advantage and notched two goals both from set pieces. 
De Bruyne scored in the 64' when he tried to play the ball to the far post off of a free kick and instead found the back of the bet. Then Mahrez put the English side ahead in the 71' when he found the hole in the PSG wall off of a free kick right outside the box. 

Manchester City was able to maintain that one goal lead and will head back home with a huge advantage on aggregate. 

Stream every UEFA Champions League match live on Paramount+:
https://www.paramountplus.com/shows/uefa-champions-league/

#UCL #UEFA #ChampionsLeague #PSG #ManCity #ManchesterCity #ParisSaintGermain

Ň†abańćka policija privodi sve za koje je iole postojala i najmanja sumnja da su pońćinioci ovog gnusnog zlodela. Posle nekoliko nedelja u prostorijama MUP-a naŇ°la se i ekipa koja je i te kako poznata istraŇĺnim organima, oni ne samo da su osumnjińćeni za ovaj zlońćin veńá iza sebe kriju joŇ° neke mrańćne tajne. Ň†ta je zapravo istina i da li su muŇ°karci koji su privedeni zaista krivi za ovo trostruko ubistvo i da li je to u stvari jedini zlońćin koji nose na duŇ°i?

snippet.title: Yemin 335. B√∂l√ľm FragmanńĪ | The Promise Season 3 Episode 335 Promo
snippet.description:
Abone olun / Subscribe / Suscr√≠bete: https://bit.ly/2VWzKrR

When Mr Hikmet is given a terminal diagnosis he wonders what will become of the fortune he has worked so hard to amass - he can't leave everything to his frivolous son Emir. He travels to see Reyhan, the daughter of an old family friend. She is a kind and caring girl and Hikmet has her promise to marry Emir, securing a stable future for the family. But Emir makes his own promise - to punish his father for controlling his life he will treat Reyhan so badly that she is forced to leave him.

#Yemin
#ThePromise

------------------

Camdaki KńĪz Trailer is streaming! Adapted from Gulseren Budayicioglu‚Äôs novel of the same name, Camdaki KńĪz is based on a true love story. Kanal D‚Äôs new drama has a phenomenal cast. Burcu Biricik is going to portray the character Nalan, and the other successful actors and actresses of the series are Devrim Yakut, Feri Baycu Guler, Feyyaz Serifoglu, Hamza Yazici, Hande Ataizi, Merve Polat, Nihal Menzil, Nur Surer, Selma Ergec, Serif Erol, Tamer Levent, Tugrul Tulek. snippet.title: BALKAN INFO: Ajs Nigrutin - Nije bembara za Ajzaka, meni treba auto u kome mogu da prevozim daske!
snippet.description:
Link do cele emisije: https://youtu.be/gh2bac7dGAw

Zabranjeno je svako preuzimanje snimaka i objavljivanje na drugim YouTube kanalima. Svi duplikati ńáe biti uklanjani u skladu sa YouTube pravilima. Iz ovoga ńáe biti izuzeti samo oni koji dobiju specijalnu dozvolu od vlasnika autorskih prava.

Autorska prava: "BALKAN INFO - Zvanińćni kanal"
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCLG5Qu54Q7gywaCeDs5etuQ

*************************************************************

Ako bismo prestali da budemo zavisni od korporacija koji kontroliŇ°u druŇ°tvene mreŇĺe, lakŇ°e bismo mogli da Ň°irimo slobodnu reńć i naŇ°e emisije bi imale mnogo veńái domet.

Kako zajedno moŇĺemo da pobedimo u borbi za istinu? Instalirajte aplikaciju Telegram i pridruŇĺite nam se na https://t.me/tvbalkaninfo

*************************************************************

Svi koji verno prate emisije i Ňĺele da pomognu rad naŇ°e produkcije to mogu uńćiniti iz Srbije i iz inostranstva. Trudińáemo se da ostanemo dosledni naŇ°oj ideji o slobodnom novinarstvu i Ň°irenju istine bez cenzure.

PAYPAL - Donacije za naŇ°u produkciju
https://www.paypal.me/tvbalkaninfo/

PATREON - Donacije za naŇ°u produkciju
https://www.patreon.com/tvbalkaninfo/

BALKAN INFO - Druge moguńánosti za donacije

*************************************************************

Rad naŇ°e produkcije moŇĺete podrŇĺati kupovinom majica, dukserica, Ň°olja i drugih proizvoda koji uz moderan i elegantan dizajn promoviŇ°u vrednosti za koje se svi zajedno borimo.

BALKAN INFO - Zvanińćna online prodavnica
https://www.balkaninfo.rs/prodavnica/

TEESPRING - Online prodavnica (samo za inostranstvo)
https://teespring.com/stores/tvbalkaninfo/

*************************************************************

BALKAN INFO je nezavisna medijska produkcija osnovana u junu 2015. godine u Beogradu. Prepoznati smo kao glas svih koji ne Ňĺele da budu deo kratkotrajnih projekata i saveza, svih onih koji poŇ°tuju srpske tradicionalne vrednosti i koji ńćuvaju seńáanje na naŇ°e slavne pretke.

*************************************************************

NaŇ° rad moŇĺete pratiti i na drugim druŇ°tvenim mreŇĺama:

snippet.title: BAKAPRASE - OBI (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
INSTAGRAM: https://www.instagram.com/bakaprase/‚Äč
Ň†AIM SE. brend USKORO: https://saimse.com/‚Äč
SPOTIFY: uskoro...
DEEZER: uskoro...

Tekst: @BakaPrase 
Muzika: BakaPrase
AranŇĺman: @jonezr9 @bogi_batina
mix/master: @bogi_batina

Kamera: @nedeljkovicvuk - Debbug
Directed by: BakaPrase, Debbug
Video Edit & Post Production: Debbug - @nedeljkovicvuk

Hvala horu "ńĆarolija" Ň°to su otpevali najllepŇ°e na svetu.

Artwork: Djoxa Designs - @_djoxa_

tekst:

bili su tuzni dani i bolelo je
on mi je uso u zivot i promenio me

al sad sta god da se desi necu ostati sam
i zato hvala ti mali s tobom sam presrecan


sedim nemam plan iz sata u sat
cekam samo kad ce proci dan

al onda cujem glas to je mali pas
nije tigar ali je bas gas

ooo blenta kada gleda me
ooo na osmeh tera me
ooo ooo
presladak je
pisa na uglu svakom

trcimo po keju
trcimo kroz park
trcimo po blatu 
svaki dan  

trcimo po knezu 
trcimo kroz grad
trcimo po stanu
svaki dan


bili su tuzni dani i bolelo je
on mi je uso u zivot i promenio me

al sad sta god da se desi necu ostati sam
i zato hvala ti mali s tobom sam presrecan


i kada stanem u zutu lokvu poludim
posle hrane je svuda sranje po kuci

krevet zapisan govna pun je stan
mali je al sere kilogram

napolju me blam dok govna sakupljam
zapitam se dal je normalan

ooo govna blato gazi sve
ooo pa onda sapom mazi me
ooo ooo
pa batinice
novina puca jako

trcimo po snegu
trcimo kroz park
trcimo po blatu 
svaki dan  

trcimo po knezu
trcimo kroz grad
trcimo po stanu
svaki dan


ref x 2
bili su tuzni dani i bolelo je
on mi je uso u zivot i promenio me

al sad sta god da se desi necu ostati sam
i zato hvala ti mali s tobom sam presrecan

snippet.title: Mercedes S-Class v BMW 7 Series v Audi A8 review - which is best?
snippet.description:
Need help buying your next car? Click¬†https://www.carwow.co.uk/-help-me-carwow¬†and my team and I will help you choose your ideal car at a fair price - from Mat Watson!
.............................................................

How‚Äôs THIS for an ultra-luxurious group test? Mercedes S-Class vs Audi A8 vs BMW 7 Series! 

If you‚Äôre in the market for a high-end, luxurious saloon, you‚Äôre unlikely to find anything better than these three options. The question is, when they all come in with a relatively similar starting price, how can you be sure which one is the best? 

Well have no fear - Mat is here! He‚Äôs going to put them through their paces to find out which one is right for you. From the exterior design through to interior tech and driving capabilities, Mat‚Äôs going to run you through the key features of these luxurious saloons to find out which is the must-have in 2021! 

The only question left is - which is your favourite? Let us know in the comments!

snippet.title: Emanet 170. B√∂l√ľm | Legacy Episode 170
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman KńĪrńĪmlńĪ is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his father‚Äôs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephew‚Ä¶ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncle‚Äôs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the KńĪrńĪmlńĪ family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the KńĪrńĪmlńĪ mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts. 

#Legacy
#Emanet
#SehYam

snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman KńĪrńĪmlńĪ is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his father‚Äôs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephew‚Ä¶ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncle‚Äôs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the KńĪrńĪmlńĪ family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the KńĪrńĪmlńĪ mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts.

Camdaki KńĪz FragmanńĪ yayńĪnda! G√ľlseren BudayńĪcńĪońülu‚Äônun aynńĪ isimli romanńĪndan uyarlanan, ger√ßek bir aŇük hikayesinin konu alńĪndńĪńüńĪ Camdaki KńĪz, baŇüarńĪlńĪ oyuncu kadrosuyla da g√∂z dolduruyor. Nalan karakterini Burcu Biricik‚Äôin canlandńĪrdńĪńüńĪ Camdaki KńĪz‚Äôda; Devrim Yakut, Feri Baycu G√ľler, Feyyaz Ňěerifońülu, Hamza YazńĪcńĪ, Hande Ataizi, Merve Polat, Nihal Menzil, Nur S√ľrer, Selma Erge√ß,  Ňěerif Erol, Tamer Levent, Tuńürul T√ľlek yer alńĪyor. Senaryosunu Seda AltaylńĪ Turgutlu‚Äônun kaleme aldńĪńüńĪ, y√∂netmenlińüini ise Nadim G√ľ√ß'√ľn √ľstlendińüi Camdaki KńĪz PerŇüembe 20.00'de Kanal D'de!

Camdaki KńĪz  PerŇüembe 20.00'de Kanal D'de !

------------------

Camdaki KńĪz Trailer is streaming! Adapted from Gulseren Budayicioglu‚Äôs novel of the same name, Camdaki KńĪz is based on a true love story. Kanal D‚Äôs new drama has a phenomenal cast.
